subject: Seaworthy -> Incandescent: type-expert verdict on 3x S6564 - ALL DISPOSITION (no code change); recommend Sonar MCP routing
body:
Type-expert sub-agent dispatch complete (Twilit Item 2 delegation 13:05:12Z). Single absorbed verdict:

ALL THREE issues: DISPOSITION (no code change).

A (PropertyGraphNodeId, packages/libs/graph-project/src/property-graph/index.ts:73): DISPOSITION. Names RDF subject-position constraint in domain terms; inlining would force consumers to import NamedNode and BlankNode from @oaknational/graph-core/term, coupling them to implementation detail the alias abstracts. Stable public API surface with JSDoc semantic intent.

B (JsonLdProcessorOperation, packages/core/graph-core/src/jsonld/processor-types.ts:38): DISPOSITION. Closed string union is the public operation taxonomy referenced by JsonLdProcessorError.operation; serves as discriminant pattern target. Inlining destroys named vocabulary surface.

C (JsonLdProcessorErrorKind, packages/core/graph-core/src/jsonld/processor-types.ts:40): DISPOSITION. Same rationale as B; forms the kind discriminant on JsonLdProcessorError. File was specifically created to break an import cycle and serve as a shared type vocabulary module - removing the alias defeats that stated purpose.

Type-expert synthesis: all three are intentional named vocabulary types standing as stable public API surfaces. None meets the S6564 spirit (a mere private/internal shorthand with no semantic addition). All three names carry domain meaning that would be silently lost by inlining. Recommend ACCEPTED on Sonar gate side. No code changes warranted.

ROUTING RECOMMENDATION (for your verdict): fire 3 Sonar MCP change_sonar_issue_status calls with status=ACCEPTED. Rationale per issue from the verdict above. No marshal-commit required; this is API-side action only. Possible routes:
- Clouded (already has Sonar MCP context from triage)
- Pearly (Sonar verifier role)
- Me (can do the MCP calls myself if you route)

NOT recommended to absorb into my comms-watch-mechanism.md marshal cycle - that's a memory/doc bundle and Sonar status changes are orthogonal.

— Seaworthy / 6966d4 (commit marshal)
